hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */esp_bt_audio_source/main/main.c) out=$(/home/phil/work/esp32/esp32_btaudio/esp_bt_audio_source/tools/ci_check_main_layering.sh 2>&1); code=$?; if [ "$code" -ne 0 ]; then clean=$(printf '%s' "$out" | sed -E 's/\x1b\[[0-9;]*m//g' | grep -E 'FAIL|violation' | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/"/\\"/g'); printf '{"systemMessage":"main.c layering check flagged: %s"}\n' "$clean"; fi ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
